---
title: "Grants"

listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, role, funder, amount, description]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Rok"
    title: "Grant"
    role: "Rola"
    funder: "Finansowanie"
    amount: "Budżet"
    description: "Opis"
---
